title: mentha × niliaca var. lamarckii
intro: Mentha × niliaca var. lamarckii, also known as Bergamot mint, is a hybrid mint plant that is a cross between water mint (Mentha aquatica) and spearmint (Mentha spicata). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bergamot mint include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms. Bergamot mint can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or added to skincare products and perfumes due to its fragrance and medicinal properties.
